Thanks for your interest in Ticketly.

This project is **source-visible but not open to code contributions**, so
pull requests aren't accepted and this one will be closed.

If you found a bug or want a feature, please open a
**[GitHub Issue](https://github.com/Shreyas0786/ticketly/issues)** instead —
that's the best way to help, and I read every one.

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.
